scenarios.cyberGoal: Build integrity: sign all release artifacts
scenarios.damageScenario: Attacker replaces signed binary with malicious version

scenarios.cyberGoal: Config integrity: store config in VCS and verify hash
scenarios.damageScenario: Attacker modifies ASIL level or safety standard to weaken enforcement

scenarios.cyberGoal: Confidentiality: restrict CLI output in CI logs
scenarios.damageScenario: Safety findings leaked to unprivileged process via stdout

scenarios.cyberGoal: Integrity: pin dependency hashes in FetchDeps.cmake
scenarios.damageScenario: Malicious dependency injected via compromised upstream

scenarios.cyberGoal: Integrity: SHA-256 hash field in qualify-report.json
scenarios.damageScenario: Attacker modifies qualify-report.json to hide failures

scenarios.cyberGoal: Freshness: timestamp + VCS revision in evidence bundle
scenarios.damageScenario: Old passing evidence file reused after test suite degrades

scenarios.cyberGoal: Availability: branch protection requires CI passing
scenarios.damageScenario: Attacker disables cpfusa check step to bypass safety enforcement
scenarios.threat: Denial of service to safety check gate

scenarios.cyberGoal: Traceability: trace coverage gate enforced in CI
scenarios.damageScenario: Developer removes annotations to hide coverage gaps
